---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an SDK capability, provider integration, or docs improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does DexCost fall short today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior or API you would like.

## Affected SDKs

- [ ] Python
- [ ] TypeScript
- [ ] Rust
- [ ] Go
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Cross-SDK behavior

## Parity Expectations

Should this work the same way in every SDK? If not, explain why.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround you are using today.
